notes: AH3 Hub v1.8.4.77 (2026-03-18) Nang cap I2A Visual Asset Search: ho tro index Model, Scene, HDRI voi smart preview detection. Them Cosmos Pro visual search + one-click 3D import. Smart Merge tu dong relink texture (50 lan/ngay mien phi). Library Manager quan ly thu muc da index. HDRI Apply truc tiep vao scene (V-Ray/Corona). Toi uu tai anh nhanh hon. Fix: Right-click context menu tren tat ca tab AI Studio (loi private access trong ban .mse build). Fix I2A backend cho model/scene/HDRI indexing. Fix orphan DB records khi xoa folder. Fix Cosmos renderer matching (V-Ray vs Corona). Them canh bao khi renderer khong phai V-Ray/Corona truoc khi import Cosmos. Luu y: Ban 1.8.4.65 tro xuong nen manual update tu Drive. Tu 1.8.4.67 tro di dung Auto-Update binh thuong.
